creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
I was racking my brains on what additional information I could put here.  It's not that easy to think about creating an archive for a bug report when your BGP is fubar.

I suppose the first fact is that I have the config files available, but do not wish to post them publically.  I have two BGP servers, one that peers only with on upstream and one that peers with about 50 other AS's and another upstream at an exchange.

The exact same config on 0.99.24 works 100% and breaks 100% on 1.0.20160315.

For ease of replication, I'd advise setting up two BGP peers with iBGP between them (same AS).  This was broken for me... and as an example, my iBGP peer looks like:
